entities.name: V
entities.context: Founder who conceived the idea ~3 years ago and has been working full-time for ~2.5 years

entities.name: Coaching App
entities.context: First product built, focused directly on job seekers, developed over ~2 years

entities.name: Job Seeker Monetization Challenge
entities.context: Learning that job seekers have limited ability and willingness to pay, even when help is in their interest

entities.name: Coaching Conversation Data Value
entities.context: Key realization that data from coaching conversations is extremely valuable—rich, detailed, and predictive of fit

entities.name: Employer-Centric Pivot
entities.context: Strategic shift to helping employers and intermediaries use candidate data rather than selling coaching directly to candidates

entities.name: Product Pivot
entities.context: Transition from job-seeker-focused coaching app to employer/intermediary data leverage model

relationships.context: V and team built and operated the coaching app for ~2 years
Learned through experience that job seekers are difficult to monetize
Key realization that drove the pivot strategy
Monetization difficulty led to rethinking the business model
Data value insight is the foundation of the new strategy
The coaching app phase preceded and informed the pivot
